title: urena lobata var. glauca
intro: Urena lobata var. glauca, also known as the Urena or Burweed, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. Traditionally, Urena lobata var. glauca has been used in folk medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Urena lobata var. glauca are said to include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Urena lobata var. glauca is often made into a tea or infused in hot water to be consumed as a remedy for various ailments.
